India-US interim trade deal is in its final stages, Foreign Secretary confirms — a direct result of PM Modi and President Trump's push. A framework agreement could reshape duties on electronics, agri goods and boost Indian exports. #IndiaNews…

India and the UK have set July 15 as the launch date for their long-awaited free trade agreement, after resolving a last-minute steel tariff dispute. The deal is set to cut duties on Indian textiles, pharma and more — reshaping bilateral trade…

Amazon's AI chief admits the company has lagged OpenAI and Anthropic in generative AI, but says it will close the gap within a year. With AWS powering much of India's startup and enterprise stack, the timeline matters. #IndiaNews…

Supreme Court refuses to stay CBSE's three-language policy, allowing it to remain in force as the case proceeds. A setback for petitioners from non-Hindi states like Tamil Nadu and Karnataka who call the formula coercive. #IndiaNews…
https://thelast24.in/articles/20260619-supreme-court-declines-interim-relief-against-cbse-s-three-language-po.html

Trump told PM Modi at the G7 that he plans to visit India — no date set. The signal comes as India-US tariff negotiations remain unresolved, with Indian exporters awaiting a trade deal. #IndiaNews #G7 #IndiaTrade
